title: Ukraine GUR Claims Hits on Russian Landing Ships in Sevastopol Bay
detail: Ukraine's Main Intelligence Directorate (GUR) claimed successful attacks on two Russian landing ships and a radar station in Sevastopol Bay, occupied Crimea. The operation continues Ukraine's sustained naval drone campaign to degrade the Russian Black Sea Fleet, which has already been forced to relocate much of its fleet from Sevastopol to Novorossiysk following repeated Ukrainian strikes. The attack came as both sides traded deadly strikes across the front.

media.caption: Ukraine's GUR claims hits on Russian landing ships in Sevastopol Bay, Crimea
